title: About this Site
description: A modern blog system based on GitHub
content:
📦The site is fully stored in a GitHub repository, and all content versions are controllable

🚀No backend, no serverless functions—just a pure static site

✏️Edit posts directly through the visual UI and submit them to the GitHub repository

🔑All users can edit; submissions require the Owner's Private Key

## Tech Stack

- Next.js
- React
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS
- Motion
- GitHub API
